case_title: EDWARD BILL WONG VS. MAYRA INFANTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT INFANTE, MAYRA SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, EDWARD BILL AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED NOV-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INFANTE, MAYRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, EDWARD BILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INFANTE, MAYRA SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC. $1,920.54 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,985.54, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.54 FILED BY WONG, EDWARD BILL AS TO DEFENDANT INFANTE, MAYRA SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2016 BY JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EDWARD BILL WONG WITH COURT PROVIDED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MAYRA INFANTE AND SCOTTISH MAIDS, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE DAMIAN GAFFNEY (VP). DEFENDANT MAYRA INFANTE ASSISTED BY COURT PROVIDED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. PARTIES STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. DEFENDANT MAYRA INFANTE MAKES ORAL REQUEST TO CORRECT COURT RECORDS OF THE SPELLING OF HER NAME FROM INFANPE TO INFANTE - GRANTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
